CODEBOOK: Acute Hospital Care at Home Patient and Hospital Data Files │ January 2024 │ V 1.0 5 

DISCHARGES 

LABEL: Count of AHCAH Discharges During the Data Submission Period 

DESCRIPTION: The number of patients discharged from the inpatient care episode during the data submission period. 

SHORT NAME: DISCHARGES 

LONG NAME: DISCHARGES 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

FILE(S): Hospital 

SOURCE: AHCAH facility-submitted data
